claim_text: Other Bali uses Uluwatu as an editorial area covering Pecatu and selected adjacent Bukit micro-areas.
allowed_wording: Other Bali uses Uluwatu as a practical visitor area across Pecatu and nearby Bukit locations.
prohibited_wording: Uluwatu is an official district with fixed visitor boundaries.
refresh_requirement: Review if canonical area taxonomy changes.

claim_text: Pecatu belongs to Kuta Selatan in Badung Regency.
allowed_wording: The Uluwatu temple and west-cliff core sit in Pecatu, Kuta Selatan, Badung.
prohibited_wording: All places marketed as Uluwatu are in Pecatu.
refresh_requirement: Refresh only if administrative source changes.

claim_text: Melasti Beach is in Desa Ungasan rather than Pecatu.
allowed_wording: Melasti sits on the Ungasan side of the broader visitor area.
refresh_requirement: Refresh only if administrative source changes.

claim_text: Places across the editorial Uluwatu area are distributed across multiple micro-areas.
allowed_wording: Planning by area can be simpler than treating Uluwatu as one walkable centre.
prohibited_wording: Uluwatu is impossible to walk; a scooter is required; fixed travel times.

claim_text: Venue entry booking and family policies differ and can change.
allowed_wording: Check the verified official booking link for current entry, age and spend terms.
prohibited_wording: All beach clubs charge entry; all listed venues are family-friendly; fixed minimum spends.
refresh_requirement: Refresh first-party links before each editorial update.

claim_text: Southern Bali marine conditions change and BMKG publishes live forecasts and warnings.
allowed_wording: Check BMKG's current southern Bali marine forecast and warnings before water activities.
prohibited_wording: A beach or surf spot is safe today; evergreen wave or current values.
refresh_requirement: Use live link only and never cache a condition claim.

claim_text: The Uluwatu district card should route to the canonical district pillar.
allowed_wording: Link the Uluwatu area card to /uluwatu.
